phases.what_was_done: Preflight truth check and mandatory bootloader/evidence read.
phases.why: Guarantee truthful scope entry before any planning output.
phases.how_to_use_verify: Check GATE_ACK + source list in report.
phases.limitation: Read-only phase; no runtime measurement refresh.

phases.what_was_done: Read-only synthesis of pressure map from reports and V0.6 source indicators.
phases.why: Anchor plan in evidence instead of speculation.
phases.how_to_use_verify: Cross-check counts/hypotheses in optimization plan JSON.

phases.what_was_done: Created optimization plan, slice plan, acceptance criteria, risk register, and next-step map.
phases.why: Define reversible, measurable implementation sequence with explicit gates.
phases.how_to_use_verify: Use slice IDs and acceptance targets as constraints for next implementation task.
phases.limitation: Planning only; no performance fix claimed.

phases.what_was_done: Produced administratum report set, self-assessment, KPD review, receipt, action card.
phases.why: Maintain auditable continuity and operator-readable control artifacts.
phases.how_to_use_verify: Trace receipt paths and action card summary.

phases.why: Prevent fake green and scope drift before commit.
phases.how_to_use_verify: Run validation commands from task brief.
phases.limitation: Final verdict depends on successful commit/push checks.

phases.what_was_done: Reserved for diff review, commit, push, and remote sync verification.
phases.why: Close task with immutable evidence and sync certainty.
phases.how_to_use_verify: Verify commit hash, push result, and local/remote HEAD match.
phases.limitation: Not complete until git operations succeed.
